# Agent Rules

- AGENT_RULE: Read WAKE.md before making project edits.
- AGENT_RULE: Run morpheus check before trusting agent-written project claims.
- AGENT_RULE: Run morpheus wake . --private before verifying local state.
- AGENT_RULE: Run morpheus verify --all after meaningful changes.
- AGENT_RULE: Never train on raw markdown.
- AGENT_RULE: Never train on rejected candidates.
- AGENT_RULE: Never activate adapters without eval.
- AGENT_RULE: Keep cloud providers opt-in.
